completed.summary: Added score breakdown panel to end-of-game screen showing per-category breakdown (temples, monuments, cities, units, technology). ScorePopup component displays ScoreBreakdown with categories array and total calculation.

Added monument scoring: +30 per monument at game end. City.monumentCount field tracks built monuments via new Monuments building on city tile. computeTribeScore() includes monumentScore. 515 tests pass.
Added temple scoring: +20 per temple at game end. City.templeCount field separate from buildings[]. computeTribeScore() includes templeScore. 515 tests pass.
Elyrion special tribe: Polytaur replaces Warrior (no Sanctuaries). Starts with Forestry.

Cymanti special tribe: Hexapod replaces Warrior, Doomux replaces Swordsman, Ryy replaces Archer. Starts with Mycelium instead of Org. All units poison on attack (no riders, knights, or ships). Centipede grows on kills (Segments). 515 tests pass.
Polaris special tribe: Ice Archer, Ice Fortress, Gaami, Mooni replace standard units. All units freeze on attack. Starts with Philosophy + Ice Bank. Can't chop trees. 515 tests pass.
Added naval combat: Ships, Ports, naval movement rules. Battleship upgrade. 515 tests pass.
Added air units: Bird riders (Elyrion), Mooni (Polaris), Ryy (Cymanti). Movement ignores terrain. 502 tests pass.

Player spawn system: all 16 tribes spawn with warrior + explorer. Elyrion spawns with Polytaur. Cymanti spawns with Hexapod. Balanced resource distribution (5-8 resources/tribe). Map boundary validation ensures no spawn overlaps. 17 unit tests + 480 game type tests pass.
Fixed multiplayer state crash: deep-clone GameState before passing to multiplayer handler. 17 multiplayer-specific tests pass.
Fixed ranged combat for multi-tile cities: archers/catapults target city center hex correctly. 460 tests pass.
Fixed resource double-count on territory expansion. 450 tests pass.
Fixed city radius conflict: cities within 2 tiles of each other share border tiles. 440 tests pass.
CLI init bug: GameState.players[0].units was undefined. 420 tests pass.
Water bodies, mountain ranges, forest clusters, fruit + animal resources, city ruins. All terrain types generate correctly.
Turn timing logic: only current player's units are active. Enforced unit limit (10 units per city + 10 bonus per capital).
Next.js basePath set to '/polytopia' in next.config.js for deployment behind nginx reverse proxy.
Tribe selection infinite loop: default bot tribes were generated twice — once on init and once on game start. Fixed by only generating default bot tribes once.
Synthesized Web Audio API sound effects: UI clicks, tribe select chime, attack hit, unit death, city capture fanfare, looping ambient arpeggio. Mute button synced. 515 tests pass, 0 regressions.

spec_gaps.item: AI territory expansion still basic — no strategic resource claiming
spec_gaps.evidence: fix-ai-opponent-intelligence (7b510c9) added balanced unit composition, strategic upgrades, and threat-aware retreat but did not address territory expansion (item 3 of task). AI still wanders rather than claiming high-value resource tiles.

spec_gaps.item: AI difficulty differentiation still minimal — Easy/Medium/Hard only differ by options config
spec_gaps.evidence: fix-ai-opponent-intelligence (7b510c9) did not implement observable strategic differences between Easy/Medium/Hard beyond the existing options config (minUnitsForUpgrade, techStarsThreshold, moveSkipChance).

coach_review.notes: Coach cycle 2026-06-26 12:35 AEST. Verified: animateAttack function exists and is hooked into both AI handler and human click handler. GameScene loads correctly, tribe selection works, END TURN advances game. 0 console errors. Combat animation visual verification deferred (enemy units too far on generated map). No methodology failures (no self-referential E2E tests). Tribe index mapping discrepancy between SelectScene and GameScene needs future investigation.

note: Tick 2026-06-26 ~16:15 UTC. Player commit: add-sound-effects-and-music — Web Audio API synthesized sounds hooked into UI, combat, death, city capture, ambient music. 515 tests pass. Switched from gto-wizard-clone (round-robin). Next: fix-unit-combat-animations.
